prompt: Tap flop middle to check coverage context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before tournament-pressure action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_mid is the board anchor, so the tournament read stays centered on the card that shapes the flop texture.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The middle flop card is the target board card because the coverage context depends on the full board read, not a guessed street label.
